Package org.rodinp.core.tests

Class CopyMoveResourcesTests

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.core.tests.AbstractRodinDBTests
org.rodinp.core.tests.ModifyingResourceTests
org.rodinp.core.tests.CopyMoveTests
org.rodinp.core.tests.CopyMoveResourcesTests
public class CopyMoveResourcesTests extends CopyMoveTests

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    setUp()
     
    void
    tearDown()
     
    void
    testCopyRF()
    Ensures that a Rodin file can be copied to a different project.
    void
    testCopyRFAndInternal()
    This operation should fail as copying a Rodin file and an internal element at the same time is not supported.
    void
    testCopyRFForce()
    Ensures that a Rodin file can be copied to a different project, replacing an existing Rodin file.
    void
    testCopyRFNoop()
    Ensures that copying a file onto itself is a no-op.
    void
    testCopyRFReadOnly()
    Ensures that a read-only Rodin file can be copied to a different project.
    void
    testCopyRFRename()
    Ensures that a Rodin file can be copied to a different project, and be renamed.
    void
    testCopyRFRenameForce()
    Ensures that a Rodin file can be copied to a different project, and be renamed, overwriting an existing Rodin file.
    void
    testCopyRFWithCollision()
    Ensures that a Rodin file cannot be copied to a different project, over an existing Rodin file when no force.
    void
    testCopyRFWithInvalidDestination()
    Ensures that a Rodin file cannot be copied to an invalid destination
    void
    testCopyRFWithNullContainer()
    Ensures that a Rodin file cannot be copied to a null container
    void
    testCopyRFWithServerProperties()
    Ensures that a Rodin file can be copied to along with its server properties.
    void
    testMoveRF()
    Ensures that a RF can be moved to a different project.
    void
    testMoveRFAndInternal()
    This operation should fail as moving a Rodin file and an internal element at the same time is not supported.
    void
    testMoveRFForce()
    Ensures that a Rodin file can be moved to a different project, replacing an existing Rodin file.
    void
    testMoveRFNoop()
    Ensures that moving a file onto itself is a no-op.
    void
    testMoveRFRename()
    Ensures that a Rodin file can be moved to a different project, and be renamed.
    void
    testMoveRFRenameForce()
    Ensures that a Rodin file can be moved to a different project, and be renamed, overwriting an existing Rodin file.
    void
    testMoveRFWithCollision()
    Ensures that a Rodin file cannot be moved to a different project, over an existing Rodin file when no force.
    void
    testMoveRFWithInvalidDestination()
    Ensures that a Rodin file cannot be moved to an invalid destination
    void
    testMoveRFWithNullContainer()
    Ensures that a Rodin file cannot be moved to a null container
    void
    testRenameRF()
    Ensures that a RF can be renamed.
    void
    testRenameRFAndInternal()
    This operation should fail as renaming a Rodin file and an internal element at the same time is not supported.
    void
    testRenameRFForce()
    Ensures that a Rodin file can be renamed, replacing an existing Rodin file.
    void
    testRenameRFNoop()
    Ensures that renaming a file onto itself is a no-op.
    void
    testRenameRFWithCollision()
    Ensures that a Rodin file cannot be renamed over an existing Rodin file when no force.
    void
    testRenameRFWithInvalidName()
    Ensures that a Rodin file cannot be renamed to an invalid name
    void
    testRenameRFWithNullName()
    Ensures that a Rodin file cannot be renamed to a null name

    • testCopyRF

      public void testCopyRF() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Ensures that a Rodin file can be copied to a different project.
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • testCopyRFAndInternal

      public void testCopyRFAndInternal() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      This operation should fail as copying a Rodin file and an internal element at the same time is not supported.
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • testCopyRFForce

      public void testCopyRFForce() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Ensures that a Rodin file can be copied to a different project, replacing an existing Rodin file.
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • testCopyRFRename

      public void testCopyRFRename() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Ensures that a Rodin file can be copied to a different project, and be renamed.
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • testCopyRFNoop

      public void testCopyRFNoop() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Ensures that copying a file onto itself is a no-op.
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • testCopyRFReadOnly

      public void testCopyRFReadOnly() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Ensures that a read-only Rodin file can be copied to a different project.
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • testCopyRFRenameForce

      public void testCopyRFRenameForce() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Ensures that a Rodin file can be copied to a different project, and be renamed, overwriting an existing Rodin file.
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • testCopyRFWithCollision

      public void testCopyRFWithCollision() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Ensures that a Rodin file cannot be copied to a different project, over an existing Rodin file when no force.
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • testCopyRFWithInvalidDestination

      public void testCopyRFWithInvalidDestination() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Ensures that a Rodin file cannot be copied to an invalid destination
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • testCopyRFWithNullContainer

      public void testCopyRFWithNullContainer() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Ensures that a Rodin file cannot be copied to a null container
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • testCopyRFWithServerProperties

      public void testCopyRFWithServerProperties() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Ensures that a Rodin file can be copied to along with its server properties. (Regression test for PR #1G56QT9)
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

      public void testMoveRF() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Ensures that a RF can be moved to a different project.
